पेन्ट उद्योगका लागि आवश्यक कच्चा पदार्थहरू र तिनको आपूर्ति स्रोत निम्नानुसार छन् [https://doind.gov.np/uploads/notices/Notices-20210704150433667.pdf]:

**आवश्यक कच्चा पदार्थहरू:**
- **Pigments (रंगद्रव्यहरू):** पेन्टलाई रंग दिने
  - Titanium dioxide (सेतो रंगका लागि)
  - Carbon black (कालो रंगका लागि)
  - Iron oxide र Cadmium sulfide (रातो रंगका लागि)
  - Metallic salts (पहेँलो र सुन्तला रंगका लागि)
  - Iron blue र Chrome yellows (नीलो र हरियो रंगका लागि)

- **Solvents (द्रवणहरू):** पेन्ट लगाउन सजिलो बनाउने

- **Resins (रेजिनहरू):** पेन्ट सुकाउन मद्दत गर्ने

results.model_output:
विदेशबाट पशु आयात गर्दा health certificate भए पनि छुट्टै laboratory test गराउनु पर्छ कि पर्दैन, र quarantine certificate कसले दिन्छ?

**Laboratory Test:**
Health certificate भएमा सामान्यतया छुट्टै laboratory test गरिँदैन, तर केही random samples भने संकलन गरिन्छ [http://dls.gov.np/rules/Performance-of-Veterinary-Services-(PVS)-Follow-up-Evaluation-Report_Nepal_Sept-2023-1746176837.pdf]। Importer ले laboratory testing को लागि भने तिर्नुपर्छ [http://dls.gov.np/rules/Performance-of-Veterinary-Services-(PVS)-Follow-up-Evaluation-Report_Nepal_Sept-2023-1746176837.pdf]।

**Quarantine Certificate:**
Border Inspection Posts (BIPs) मा आयात गरिएको मालबसारको निरीक्षण पछि quarantine certificate प्रदान गरिन्छ [http://dls.gov.np/rules/Performance-of-Veterinary-Services-(PVS)-Follow-up-Evaluation-Report_Nepal_Sept-2023-1746176837.pdf]। Entry permit भने Quarantine section का official veterinarians वा अन्य delegated professional/paraprofessional ले Animal Health and Livestock Services Act को Article 26 अनुसार खोल्छन् [http://dls.gov.np/rules/Performance-of-Veterinary-Services-(PVS)-Follow-up-Evaluation-Report_Nepal_Sept-2023-1746176837.pdf]।
results.gold_answer: A health certificate generally confers compliance so routine sampling is usually waived, but importers still pay for lab testing when samples are taken and some random samples are collected; quarantine certificates are issued by official veterinarians at border inspection points (BIPs) after inspection of the consignment.

Based on the provided sources, **Nepali citizenship ≠ Nepali passport**. They are separate documents with distinct purposes.

**Citizenship Certificate:**
- The citizenship certificate is the primary and mandatory proof of Nepali citizenship [https://www.sebon.gov.np/uploads/uploads/UUqlgCkhxAnGbqkZMirCcGEdtFnx4KBmNeQqdicw.pdf]
- Source [1] explicitly states: "Number of citizenship certificate or passport (number and details) **(Citizenship certificate number is a must for Nepali citizenship)**" — indicating citizenship certificate is the core document for establishing citizenship [https://www.sebon.gov.np/uploads/uploads/UUqlgCkhxAnGbqkZMirCcGEdtFnx4KBmNeQqdicw.pdf]

**Passport:**
- Passport is listed as an **alternative or supplementary** document for address verification and identity, not as proof of citizenship itself [https://www.sebon.gov.np/uploads/uploads/UUqlgCkhxAnGbqkZMirCcGEdtFnx4KBmNeQqdicw.pdf]
- In the SEBON investor registration form, passport is one of several documents accepted for proving permanent address (alongside citizenship certificate, utility bills, voter rolls, or land registration) [https://www.sebon.gov.np/uploads/uploads/UUqlgCkhxAnGbqkZMirCcGEdtFnx4KBmNeQqdicw.pdf]

**Key distinction:**
- **Citizenship certificate** = proof of Nepali nationality/citizenship status
- **Passport** = travel document issued to citizens for international travel; requires citizenship as prerequisite

The sources do not provide details on whether a separate "citizenship card" exists as a distinct physical format from the certificate.
